details.test: Task 1: Join cheapest membership tier with conference discount <= $200/year

Task 4: Contact largest regional chapter in New York
Task 5: Save highest-paying remote Project Manager job

Task 7: Subscribe to Policy & Advocacy Updates and Training & Events (monthly)
Task 8: Follow current Board Chair profile
Task 9: Save most recent policy press release about regulation changes
